calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-22-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ellen Chaitin., Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Karen Held, #2857

MARK HUDAK, Esq. appeared for plaintiff WSM ENTERPRISES, who was not present at today's hearing, REPRESENTED BY VINCENT SABASTIANO
No appearance by defendant TROPHY PROPERTIES IV B8A, LLC.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff WSM ENTERPRISES, and against the Defaulted Defendant TROPHY PROPERTIES IV B8A, LLC as follows:

DAMAGES $7645..; PREJUDMT INT 10% $1334. FOR A TOTAL $8979.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
